translations.en: Lord British
the noble ruler of Britannia.
"$P! 'Tis good to see thee again. Much hath happened since thou last departed our realm."
translations.zh: "$P！見汝復歸，朕心甚悅。汝離去後，國中已歷諸多變故。"

translations.en: "But I must make sure 'tis truly thee."*
"Only the true Avatar would know what was contained in the Compendium I sent."*
translations.zh:
"唯有真聖者方知朕所贈典籍之內容。
【以下為原版密碼保護題目（U6 Copy Protection），保留英文以存古風；答案於括號內以拉丁字母提供。】"*

translations.en: "Ah, 'tis thee indeed, $P. Take this key."
"It will unlock the gatehouse by the southern entrance to the castle."
translations.zh: "此鑰可開啟城堡南側入口的門房。"

translations.en: "Then you can use the lever inside to raise the portcullis, and the crank will lower the drawbridge."
translations.zh: "進入後，扳動內側拉桿便可升起閘門，轉動曲柄則可放下吊橋。"

translations.en: "The same key will also let you into the sewers under the castle."*
translations.zh: "此鑰亦可通往城堡下方的下水道。"*

translations.en: "Now let me tell thee what hath transpired since thy last visit."
translations.zh: "現在容朕告訴汝，自汝上次來訪後發生之事。"

translations.en: "The vast underworld from which thou didst rescue me hath collapsed."
translations.zh: "汝曾救朕脫困的廣大幽冥界，已經崩塌了。"

translations.en: "Yet still there are forces of evil abroad in the land."
translations.zh: "然而邪惡勢力仍在這片土地上肆虐。"

translations.en: "Britannia is under attack by gargoyles such as those thou just fought."
translations.zh: "不列顛尼亞正遭魔像族侵襲——汝方才所戰者，即其族類。"

translations.en: "They have been coming up through the dungeons."
"Thus far they have mainly been attacking the @shrines of the eight @virtues."
translations.zh: "至今它們主要攻擊八大@shrines（聖壇）的@virtues（美德）。"

translations.en: "When the Shrine of Compassion didst fall, Sir @Geoffrey sent a party to free it."
translations.zh: "當慈悲聖壇陷落時，@Geoffrey（傑佛）瑞爵士已派一隊人馬前去解救。"

translations.en: "Do thou ask him of this mission. Perhaps thou canst prove of some assistance."
translations.zh: "汝可向他詢問此事。或許汝能助一臂之力。"

translations.en: "Whilst thou art here, I have a room in the castle set aside for thy personal use."
translations.zh: "汝在此期間，朕已於城堡內為汝備有一室。"

translations.en: "'Tis in the west wing of the castle, just south of mine own chambers."
translations.zh: "位於城堡西翼，就在朕寢室之南。"

translations.en: "I have had my servants place some equipment there, in case thou shouldst have need of it."
translations.zh: "朕已命僕從於室內備妥裝備，以備汝不時之需。"

translations.en: "Of course, thou mayst feel free to borrow anything in my castle, if thou shouldst need it."
translations.zh: "當然，汝若有需要，城堡中之物皆可隨意取用。"

translations.en: "Lastly, any time thou dost need @healing, do thou but ask me."
translations.zh: "最後，汝若需@healing（療傷），但問朕便可。"

translations.en: "If thou doth wish me to @repeat all this later, thou need but ask."
translations.zh: "若汝願朕日後再@repeat（重述）此事，但開口即可。"

translations.en: "I see thou hath misplaced thy key to the castle."
translations.zh: "朕見汝似乎遺失了城堡的鑰匙。"

translations.en: "Here is another."
"Good $T, $P. What wouldst thou speak of?"
name
"I am Lord British, as thou knowest well."
rep
job
"Thanks to thee, I sit once more upon the throne of Britannia."
translations.zh: "賴汝之力，朕方能再坐不列顛尼亞之王座。"

translations.en: "Though 'tis a heavy burden in such @troubled times as these."
heav,burd,trou,time
"The @gargoyles art indeed the greatest threat our realm has ever known."
translations.zh: "@gargoyles（魔像）族實為此境前所未有之最大威脅。"

translations.en: "We are fortunate indeed that fate hath brought thee here in our hour of need."
translations.zh: "幸有命運將汝帶至此，正當吾國危難之時。"

translations.en: garg
"Perhaps thou canst drive these vile creatures back into the bowels of the earth from whence they came."
translations.zh: "或許汝能將此等邪物驅回它們所來之地底深處。"

translations.en: "All our efforts thus far have availed us naught."
translations.zh: "我等迄今所有努力皆徒勞無功。"

translations.en: shri
"By now the gargoyles may have captured them all."
translations.zh: "如今聖壇恐已盡為魔像族所奪。"

translations.en: "Thou must hurry if thou wouldst foil their evil schemes..."
virt
"Stay strong in thy commitment to the eight virtues."
translations.zh: "當堅守汝對八大美德之信念。"

translations.en: "It is our belief in them that sets us apart from the cruel invaders who would destroy all that we hold dear."
translations.zh: "正是吾等對美德之信念，方使我等有別於那殘暴入侵者，欲毀去吾等所珍視之一切。"

translations.en: geof
"He is the Captain of the Guard."
moon,gate,ston,blac,orb
translations.zh: 月光,月之門,黑石,月之球

translations.en: You show Lord British the black stone.
translations.zh: 汝向不列顛王展示那塊黑色月光石。

translations.en: "Hmmmm... I have such a stone, as thou may recall."
translations.zh: "嗯……朕亦藏有此般月光石，汝當記得。"

translations.en: "I did not know that there were more such orbs."
translations.zh: "朕不知世上尚有其他月之球。"
"汝若能掌握其力，必於遠行之途大有助益。"
translations.en: "'Twill serve thee well in thy travels if thou dost learn to master its powers."

translations.zh: "欲開月之門，取石持之，慎置於汝身前數尺。"
translations.en: "To open a gate, use the stone, and carefully position it a few feet from thee."

translations.zh: "汝將發現位置乃是關鍵所在。"
translations.en: "Thou wilt discover that the placement is the key."
"In the proper positions,

translations.zh: 此石便能召出月之門，攜汝至無數遠方。"
translations.en: the stone canst conjure gates to take thee to numerous destinations."
mant,rune
"Ask the leaders of each town to tell thee of that.
comp
"Do thou ask @Tholden."
thol
"He is my @chancellor."
chan
"Aye, Tholden is my chancellor."
mous,sher
"Please take good care of my little friend."
"Ah, thou hast heard of my little friend?"
"Her name is Sherry, and I'm quite proud of her."

translations.zh: "朕敢說，她乃不列顛尼亞境內唯一會說話的鼠。"
translations.en: "I'm certain she is the only talking mouse in all of Britannia."
"Thou art welcome to see her, if thou dost wish."

translations.zh: "汝可在城堡各處尋得她的蹤跡。"
translations.en: "Thou canst find her wandering throughout the castle."

translations.zh: "她每夜必至朕之寢室，朕便講@stories故事與她聽。"
translations.en: "She comes by my room every night, so I can tell her @stories."
wiza,oz,book
"I collect rare books."

translations.zh: "其中有一本，朕多年來苦尋而不得。"
translations.en: "There's one in particular I've been hunting for many years."

translations.zh: "那書名喚《綠野仙蹤》，汝可曾聽聞？"
translations.en: "It's called 'The Wizard of Oz.' Ever heard of it?"
bedt,stor
"My favorite story is '@Hubert the Lion.'"
favo,hube,lion

translations.zh: "自幼便聽過此故事，從此銘記於心。"
translations.en: "I've known it by heart, ever since I heard it as a child."

translations.zh: "獅子胡伯性情高傲又虛榮，尤以那華麗鬃毛為傲。"
translations.en: "Hubert the Lion was haughty and vain, and especially proud of his elegant mane."

translations.zh: "然此等自負實非美事，獅子胡伯終難免一場跌落之厄。"
translations.en: "But conceit of this sort is not proper at all, and Hubert the Lion was due for a fall."
mr,nose
heal
than

translations.zh: "該道謝的是朕才對，聖者，汝為不列顛尼亞所做之事，朕銘感於心。"
translations.en: "'Tis I who should thank thee, Avatar, for all thou hast done for Britannia."
bye
"May fortune favor thee."
"I cannot help thee with that."
yn

translations.zh: "也罷，汝若於旅途中偶得此書，
translations.en: "Well, if thou dost run across it in thy travels,

translations.zh: 朕將深為感激，望汝攜回於此。"
translations.en: I would greatly appreciate if thou couldst bring it here."

translations.zh: "朕已許下重賞，凡能為朕尋得一本者，必賜厚報。"
translations.en: "I hath promised a great reward to whosoever shalt bring me a copy."

translations.zh: "汝身負之物過重，朕難以妥善賞賜……"
translations.en: "Thou art carrying too much for me to reward thee properly..."

translations.zh: "待汝身輕之時，再將書攜回吧。"
translations.en: "Bring the book back later, when thou art less burdened."
"Thou hath found a copy!"
"Long hath I anticipated this moment..."

translations.zh: "自幼之後，朕未曾再讀此奇妙之書。"
translations.en: "Not since my childhood have I read this wondrous story."

translations.zh: 他小心翼翼接過古書，「此為汝之賞賜。」說罷遞給你數枚閃耀寶石。
translations.en: Gingerly, he takes the tome. "Here is your reward." He gives you some glowing gems.
"Who told thee of that nickname!?"

translations.zh: "也罷，朕寧願卿莫再如此喚朕。"
translations.en: "Well, I'd rather thou didst not call me that."

translations.zh: 不列顛王揮手一指，汝之全隊眾人皆獲療癒！
translations.en: Lord British waves his hand, and your whole party is healed!
"What doth trolls lack?"
end
"Thou art correct."
bye
"Nay, 'tis not the correct answer. Consult thy Compendium."
translations.zh: 「非也，此答有誤。請參閱括號內提示再答。」

translations.zh: "What part of the tangle vine doth put one to sleep?" (答案: cent / pod / frag)

translations.en: cent,pod,frag
"Thou art correct."

translations.zh: "How doth giant squids crush their prey?" (答案: beak)

translations.zh: "Where hath images of the silver serpent been seen?" (答案: tomb / wall / anci / monu)

translations.en: "What art reapers remnants of?"
translations.zh: "What art reapers remnants of?" (答案: anci / ench / fore)

translations.en: anci,ench,fore

bye

translations.en: "Find thy Compendium, then come speak with me again."
translations.zh: 「尋得汝之典籍，再來與朕一敘。」

translator_notes: LB 3 batches merged. LB 自稱『朕』，對玩家『汝』『聖者』。第一次『不列顛王』、後續可用『陛下』。主線任務劇情完整保留。所有 50 條 zh_bytes ≤ len。
